---
title: "Healthy Future — Belgium Talk 2026"
subtitle: "Stanford REAP Conference, Leuven, March 28, 2026"
---

## Overview

Analysis and slide deck for:

> **"AI-Enhanced Curriculum Delivery for Community Health Workers: Evidence and Design from the Healthy Future Platform"**  
> Sean Sylvia (UNC) · Gary Darmstadt & Yunwei Chen (Stanford) · Ann Weber & Siva Balakrishnan (UNR)  
> Stanford REAP Conference · Irish College Leuven · March 28, 2026

## Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [Analysis Notebook](analysis/hf_analysis.html) | R analysis — slides 6–9 |
| [Slide Deck](slides/hf_slides.html) | Reveal.js presentation |

## Data

`data/HF_main_anasam.dta` — Stata dataset from HF 2024 Evaluation Paper pipeline.

**Analysis approach:** OLS with pre-selected LASSO controls (`_CHILD_*`, `_FAM_*`, `_CARE_*`) + county FEs (`_CID_*`), cluster-robust SEs by township (TID). Controls pre-generated by Stata pdslasso pipeline in `HF_main_anasam.dta`.
